languages.text: "Раньше оно проще было — командир, считай, на соседней ветке живет. Сразу тебе и приказ выдаст, и паек, и на врага укажет. Хотя..." {n}Губернатор со скрежетом чешет заросшую щетиной шею.{/n} "Врать не буду, теперь о пропитании можно не думать, ружья новые, маслом еще пахнут... Жить можно".

traits.locale_text: "Раньше оно проще было — командир, считай, на соседней ветке живет. Сразу тебе и приказ выдаст, и паек, и на врага укажет. Хотя..." {n}Губернатор со скрежетом чешет заросшую щетиной шею.{/n} "Врать не буду, теперь о пропитании можно не думать, ружья новые, маслом еще пахнут... Жить можно".

languages.text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

Хотя..." {n}Губернатор со скрежетом чешет заросшую щетиной шею.{/n} "Врать не буду, теперь о пропитании можно не думать, ружья новые, маслом еще пахнут... Жить можно".

Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

languages.text: “以前那才叫简单。指挥官就在旁边那根树枝上，一边下命令，一边发口粮，还顺带分配目标。不过嘛……”{n}总督用手摩挲着他那满是胡茬的脖颈。{/n}“说实话，吃的不成问题了，步枪也是全新的，还闻得到枪油味儿……这日子其实也不算太糟。”
languages.original_text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

traits.locale_text: “以前那才叫简单。指挥官就在旁边那根树枝上，一边下命令，一边发口粮，还顺带分配目标。不过嘛……”{n}总督用手摩挲着他那满是胡茬的脖颈。{/n}“说实话，吃的不成问题了，步枪也是全新的，还闻得到枪油味儿……这日子其实也不算太糟。”

languages.text: "Eskiden daha basitti. Komutan hemen bir sonraki dalda olurdu. Emirleri, tayınları ve hedefleri aynı anda verirdi. Gerçi..." {n}Vali, anız bağlamış boynunu sıvazlıyor.{/n} "Doğruyu söylemek gerekirse yiyecek meselesi sorun olmaktan çıktı, tüfekler de yepyeni. Öyle ki hâlâ yağ kokuyorlar... Hayat daha kötü olabilirdi."
languages.original_text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

traits.locale_text: "Eskiden daha basitti. Komutan hemen bir sonraki dalda olurdu. Emirleri, tayınları ve hedefleri aynı anda verirdi. Gerçi..." {n}Vali, anız bağlamış boynunu sıvazlıyor.{/n} "Doğruyu söylemek gerekirse yiyecek meselesi sorun olmaktan çıktı, tüfekler de yepyeni. Öyle ki hâlâ yağ kokuyorlar... Hayat daha kötü olabilirdi."

languages.text: « La vie était plus simple, avant. Le commandant était toujours dans les parages, à distribuer les ordres, les rations et les cibles en même temps. D'un autre côté... {n}commence le gouverneur en frottant sa barbe de trois jours.{/n} À vrai dire, on a de quoi manger à notre faim et des fusils flambant neuf qui sentent encore l'huile... alors, ça pourrait être pire. »
languages.original_text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

traits.locale_text: « La vie était plus simple, avant. Le commandant était toujours dans les parages, à distribuer les ordres, les rations et les cibles en même temps. D'un autre côté... {n}commence le gouverneur en frottant sa barbe de trois jours.{/n} À vrai dire, on a de quoi manger à notre faim et des fusils flambant neuf qui sentent encore l'huile... alors, ça pourrait être pire. »

languages.text: «Antes era todo más sencillo. El comandante estaba aquí mismo, en la rama de al lado. Repartía órdenes, raciones y objetivos al mismo tiempo. Pero, por otra parte...». {n}El gobernador se lleva la mano al cuello, donde crece una baba incipiente.{/n} «Si le digo la verdad, la comida ya no es un problema, tenemos rifles nuevos que todavía huelen a lubricante... La vida podría ser peor».
languages.original_text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

traits.locale_text: «Antes era todo más sencillo. El comandante estaba aquí mismo, en la rama de al lado. Repartía órdenes, raciones y objetivos al mismo tiempo. Pero, por otra parte...». {n}El gobernador se lleva la mano al cuello, donde crece una baba incipiente.{/n} «Si le digo la verdad, la comida ya no es un problema, tenemos rifles nuevos que todavía huelen a lubricante... La vida podría ser peor».

languages.text: "Früher war es einfacher. Der Commander wäre gleich auf dem nächsten Ast gestanden. Er hätte Befehle, Rationen und Ziele verteilt, alles gleichzeitig. Andererseits ..." {n}Der Gouverneur reibt sich mit einer Hand das feiste Genick.{/n} "Um ehrlich zu sein, ist die Verpflegung ist kein Problem mehr und die Gewehre sind nagelneu, riechen sogar noch nach Öl ... Das Leben könnte schlimmer sein."
languages.original_text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

traits.locale_text: "Früher war es einfacher. Der Commander wäre gleich auf dem nächsten Ast gestanden. Er hätte Befehle, Rationen und Ziele verteilt, alles gleichzeitig. Andererseits ..." {n}Der Gouverneur reibt sich mit einer Hand das feiste Genick.{/n} "Um ehrlich zu sein, ist die Verpflegung ist kein Problem mehr und die Gewehre sind nagelneu, riechen sogar noch nach Öl ... Das Leben könnte schlimmer sein."

languages.text: 「昔はもっとシンプルだった。司令官は次の枝にいて、命令、食料、標的をまとめて渡してくれた。でもね…」{n}知事は顎の生えた首を撫でる。{/n}「正直なところ、食料は問題ではなく、ライフルは新品で、まだ油の匂いがする。もっとひどい状況もある」
languages.original_text: "It used to be simpler. The commander would be right there on the next branch. He'd hand out orders, rations, and targets all at once. Then again..." {n}The governor rubs a hand over his stubbled neck.{/n} "Truth be told, food's not an issue anymore, and the rifles are brand new, still smelling of oil... Life could be worse."

traits.locale_text: 「昔はもっとシンプルだった。司令官は次の枝にいて、命令、食料、標的をまとめて渡してくれた。でもね…」{n}知事は顎の生えた首を撫でる。{/n}「正直なところ、食料は問題ではなく、ライフルは新品で、まだ油の匂いがする。もっとひどい状況もある」
